sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n65035" key="marilopo/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μᾰρῑλο-πότης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n65035.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">coal-dust-gulper</tr_>, of a blacksmith, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">APl.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.15</biblScope> </bibl>*.</sense> </entryFree>
